untranslatable_reason: Island Reversal requires identifying two distinct gaps with an 'island' candle(s) between them, followed by waiting for pullback/throwback completion before entry. This multi-bar pattern sequence with time-based confirmation (1-2 weeks, <1 month abandonment rule) and directional confirmation after retrace cannot be fully expressed with single-bar indicator conditions. The pattern requires: (1) gap identification across multiple bars, (2) island isolation confirmation, (3) explicit pullback/throwback timing and completion logic, and (4) directional reversal confirmation—features that exceed basic indicator-based conditions and require pattern-recognition logic.
